about.description: Official overview of Parul University including history, mission, vision, leadership, campus overview, and institutional profile.

research.description: Information about research activities, innovation centres, patents, funded projects, publications, and academic research initiatives.

awards.description: Details about university rankings, awards, recognitions, ratings, accreditations, and institutional achievements.

placements.description: Information about campus placements including companies visiting the university, campus recruitment drives, placement statistics, internship programs, corporate hiring events, and student placement records.

life_at_pu.description: Details about campus life, student activities, clubs, cultural festivals, sports events, extracurricular programs, and student engagement opportunities.

iqac.description: Information about the Internal Quality Assurance Cell including academic quality standards, institutional governance, audits, and compliance mechanisms.

student_services.description: Details about student support services including hostel facilities, counseling, scholarships, welfare programs, grievance redressal, and student assistance systems.

connect.description: Official contact details of Parul University including address, phone numbers, email contacts, enquiry forms, and communication channels.

admissions_overview.description: Overview of online admissions including available programs, admission announcements, and application-related updates.

how_to_apply.description: Step-by-step admission process including eligibility criteria, required documents, application procedure, and admission guidelines.

apply_portal.description: Official online application portal where students submit admission forms and track application status.

all_programs.description: Comprehensive list of undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral programs offered at Parul University.

careers.description: Information about job vacancies at Parul University including faculty recruitment, staff openings, administrative positions, and employment opportunities within the university.

privacy_policy.description: Official privacy policy explaining data usage, data protection practices, and website privacy guidelines.

terms_of_use.description: Terms and conditions governing the use of Parul University website and online services.

wikipedia.description: Encyclopedic third-party overview of Parul University including public history, academic structure, and general information.

shiksha_profile.description: External educational profile including student reviews, rankings, ratings, programs, and admission insights.
